name: github-copilot-ado-decorators
description: Azure DevOps Pipeline Decorator Extension — GitHub Copilot Failure Analysis
author: returngisorg

scripts.postcompile: cp src/copilot-failure-analysis-task/task.json dist/copilot-failure-analysis-task/ && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/copilot-failure-analysis-task/package.json', JSON.stringify({dependencies:{'azure-pipelines-task-lib':'^4.0.0'}}))" && npm install --production --prefix dist/copilot-failure-analysis-task && mkdir -p copilot-analysis-tab/lib && cp node_modules/vss-web-extension-sdk/lib/VSS.SDK.min.js copilot-analysis-tab/lib/
scripts.build:dev: npm run compile && npm run package-extension:dev
